contents: {a=Person_Rick}Rick{/} murdered a news reporter, live on television. Babestation News was reporting the new deadly disease spreading around called "Craig Flu disease". This disease was discovered in 2006 but has now became a national threat. The on-site reporter, {a=Person_Judy}Judy{/} from Ohio, interviewed Rick about what he thinks.

"Well, let me tell you something. This ain't nothing like when telling your straight friend you have feelings happened. When telling your straight friend you have feelings happened, I wasn't myself anymore. I went 666,642,069 days with no sleep. That's a very, very long time." That is 1.8 million years of no sleep.
"But sir, over 69 people have died. That's a lot of people." Judy Responded.
"ha! So what? I've killed people before and no one stopped me, yet. I have been on the run for one recurring years. I'm immortal!"
Judy quickly called for help, before getting shot by Rick. A nearby police office, Sentry Ultrakill, was the first on the scene and chased Rick away.

People have found out that {a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{/} has been cloning himself every week, since 2022. This would mean there are at least 150 Nova clones. No one knows where these clones are today or which one is the original Nova. Nova has been denying this to be nonfactual.
{a=Person_Craig}Craig{/} and {a=Person_Aheko}Aheko{/} announced that they will be collaborating to create a new experimental product: {a=Product_AhekoSchmeat}Aheko's Schmeat{/}.

A hyper intelligent octopus, claiming to be a famous movie star called Ur Mom, ordered {a=Product_AhekoSchmeat}Aheko's Schmeat{/} and had it delivered to 1234 Dingle-berry street in New York. Ur Mom tried to use their previous one to saw, but it broke. They then suspiciously requested to have it refunded a minute later. After The Royal Mail picked up the Aheko's Schmeat and walked to the delivery van, it suddenly exploded with liquid nitrogen. Ur Mom was later captured, after the incident. They were revealed to be {a=Person_AgentPotatoBean}Agent Potato Bean{/} and working with {a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{/} on Operation Aheko's Schmeat.
{a=Person_Craig}Craig{/} accidentally locked {a=Person_Toast}Toast{/} and {a=Person_Ritikl}Ritikl{/} in his bathroom for 30 minutes straight.

A devastating crash between two trucks took place in Farmington New Mexico. {a=Person_Craig}Craig{/} and {a=Person_Yuuichi}Yuuichi{/} were both delivering railcar movers, when Yuuichi crashed directly into the right side of Craig's truck at an alleged 80mph. This launched the truck around 60ft across the road, costing $17,005 in vehicle and cargo damages.

{a=Person_Craig}Craig{/} opened up a new restaurant called {a=Location_RedRobin}Red Robin{/}. Along with his currently available products, the menu contains a selection of new Craig cuisines served by femboys dressed in maid outfits: {a=Product_CraigMaidSoda}Craig Maid Soda{/}, {a=Product_CatPee}Cat Pee{/}, {a=Product_YummyYumTummyTumTumSodi}Yummy Yum Tummy Tum Tum Sodi{/}, {a=Product_OneBillionDollarPopcorn}One Billion Dollar Popcorn{/}, {a=Product_NovaSaggyBreasts}Nova's Saggy Breasts{/} (naturally sourced from the clones), the {a=Product_CheapyMcCheapscapeMeal}Cheapy McCheapscape Meal{/}, and {a=Product_CraigFizzyJizzySoda}Craig's Fizzy Jizzy Soda{/}.

An alien race of {a=Organisation_HumanoidPonies}humanoid ponies{/} tried to challenge the {a=Organisation_HyperIntelligentOctopi}hyper intelligent octopi's{/} rule over the USA by hosting a presidential debate, moderated by {a=Person_Zarlock}Zarlock{/} under the alias "Bob". The nominees were {a=Person_JoeOlden}Joe Olden{/} of the humanoid ponies and {a=Person_DonDrump}Don Drump{/} of the hyper intelligent octopi. At one moment of humour, Zarlock pointed out that Drump had a slice of American cheese over his face and offered to take it off for him. Drump even suddenly changed colour, voice, and tone. He even regained the cheese on his face and Zarlock had to take that one off too. After the debate ended and toilet paper was thrown at Zarlock, he concluded that "Earth can neither be saved nor conquered. So I'm going back to my home planet." and swiftly teleported back to Ponyville.

header: Cancelation of "Do You Know Your Friends?"
contents: {a=Person_Tokxi}Tokxi{/} and {a=Person_Lynx}Lynx{/} had joined a gameshow called "Do You Know Your Friends?". during one of the questions, they talked about how they once stole a limited-edition bong from the host and that Tokxi still uses it today. This angered the host so much, he began attacking Tokxi and caused their show to be cancelled.

{a=Person_Poppet}Poppet{/} begins work on digging a hole in {a=Location_LynxShed}Lynx's backyard{/}. She finds a lot of valuable ores and has made over £45k in this expedition. When she reached the bottom of the backyard, she found a cave of moles guarding a chest. She then opened it up and found nothing inside. This disappointed Poppet so much, she left the hole and never spoke about it again.

{a=Person_Craig}Craig{/} has expanded his empire by getting elected as the new mayor of a town. His first order was to rename the town to {a=Location_Craigville}Craigville{/}. He then, unexpectedly, outlawed walking outside without proper registration. This caused some backlash and widespread confusion amongst the residents.

{a=Person_Tokxi}Tokxi{/} opened his first store, in {a=Location_Craigville}Craigville{/}, and called it {a=Location_TokxiHerbalRemedies}Tokxi's Herbal Remedies{/}. He hired {a=Person_Foxcat}Foxcat{/} as the store manager, a random {a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{/} clone as the clerk, and 2 homeless guys as pirate mascots with Craig cockatanas. Unfortunately, Tokxi forgot to tell Nova about the mascots. So Nova attacked one of them with a screwdriver, leading him to immediately get fired and the pirates to be assigned to replace him.

header: Fall of Not Narrator the Stinki
contents: {a=Person_NotNarrator}Not Narrator the Stinki{/} set up a base of evil, at ?????? street in {a=Location_Craigville}Craigville{/}, to take down the {a=Organisation_TeenageMutantNinjaTurtles}TMNT{/}. Unfortunately for him, they already killed Tiger Strike the big bad kitty. The TMNT break into the base and killed Shamura by summoning a soldier from the US military, who punched her with a critical hit. Not Narrator the Stinki was then tracked down at his lair and quickly met the same fate. RIP.

{a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{/} decided to branch out from {a=Organisation_Craiginc}Craig inc.{/} and made his own line of treats called {a=Product_MushroomFemboyNovaGummies}Mushroom Femboy Nova Gummies{/} (trademark and patents pending).
Poppet has been reported to taste like Cheerios.
{a=Person_Craig}Craig{/} tried his hand at making a haiku of their own, inspired by Aheko's Bible:
"I sucked a dick. How are you doing today? Fridge fridge fridge fridge fridge."
{a=Person_Junkrat}Junkrat{/} found the haiku to be underwhelming.

Many wild {a=Species_CraigPurplePenis}Craig Purple Penises{/} were spotted at {a=Location_Craigville}Craigville{/}. These things have been known to be pretty homicidal and have currently killed a farther and two kids.

The kids were on their way home from shooting school school when they got distracted by a nearby alcoholic, calling themselves a "proud, noble, traffic guard". The guy was stopping them from crossing the road and getting home to play {a=Media_3DSChat}3DS Chat{/} on their {a=Product_GayStation5}Gay Station 5{/}. The kids managed to distract the alcoholic with a ghosty booey boohoo and ran away. Few minutes later, they were then jumped by a Craig Purple Penis and viciously mauled alive. Forensics are still figuring out the details of the father's death, however.
A recording of a board meeting at {a=Organisation_Craiginc}Craig inc.{/}, between {a=Person_Craig}Craig{/}, {a=Person_Aheko}Aheko{/}, and {a=Person_Toast}Toast{/}, was leaked online.

It was about a new planned product for their collaboration: {a=Product_FootCoveredInMeltedBabies}a foot covered in melted babies{/}. The melted babies were for an "extra silky smooth mouth feel." as stated by Craig. Toast described it as "totally UwU!" and added "We could turn that into a viral video about drug dealing". Craig disagreed with his assessment: "No! No, I won't let you make a mockery of my art! My recipes have been in my family for 9 trillion years."

Craig passes the dish to Aheko and Toast pulls out a camera. Aheko then proclaims "UwU" before tucking into the dish. Craig asked if it felt like "having a great great great grandfather stroking your penis very slowly?" and Toast wondered if "it tastes like it smells like my dead {a=Product_Poppetsicle}Poppetsicle{/} called Dick?". Aheko fell in extreme discomfort and began moaning about their equilibrium. Toast rushed to grab a glass of {a=Product_FruityGatorade}Fruity Gatorade{/} drink for them.
The product was later scrapped for failing to pass the FDA because of it's copious amount of melted babies.

{a=Person_Tokxi}Tokxi{/} mysteriously lost his balls after catching a rare disease called the Sillies. This doesn't usually happen and has lead doctors to believe that it has mutated to not only erase your genitalia, but even be resilient to the cure.

{a=Person_Toast}Toast{/} tried opening their own food chain, to compete with {a=Person_Craig}Craig's{/} {a=Location_RedRobin}Red Robin{/}, called {a=Location_JizzyCheesyCreamys}Jizzy Cheesy Creamys{/}. The menu has a strong start for this venture, containing many classic dishes such as: {a=Product_FlavoredBurstingBurgers}Flavored Bursting Burgers{/}, {a=Product_MegaPizza}Mega Pizza{/}, and the {a=Product_salmonAssDetrout}salmon ass de-trout{/}.

{a=Person_Tokxi}Tokxi{/} got themselves 2 new boyfriends: {a=Person_JohnHelldiver}John Helldiver the Bigus Dickus{/}, who also has a weird obsession with Dumbledore, and {a=Person_MrGutterman}Mr. Gutterman{/}. After a game of Dungeons and Dragons between the boyfriends, Tokxi, and {a=Person_Aheko}Aheko{/}, Gutterman and John Helldiver decided to leave Tokxi and marry each other instead.

{a=Person_ElonMusk}Elon Musk{/}, owner of Tesla, partnered with the US government to use {a=Location_LynxShed}Aheko's Cuck Shed{/} for selling their own Bad Dragon Toys. They planned to make them much larger and include multiple {a=Product_PoppetSpecialFunToys}Poppet's Special Fun Toys{/}. This product was discontinued 2 weeks after launch because of its poor build quality for a cost $500.
